text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems that Hishi Amazon will be running in the
Japan Cup, while Matikanetannhauser will be
entering the autumn Tenno Sho taking place just
before it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Compared to the impressive competition Narita
Brian has faced in the past, people seem less
worried. However, Narita Brian doesn't let her
guard down.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Biwa Hayahide admires how hard Brian is training.
Yet, Narita Brian feels uncomfortable with how
her older sister speaks so distantly, as if she is just
a spectator.
